metadata.title: Zerodha Varsity
metadata.description:
Zerodha Varsity is an easy to grasp, collection of stock market lessons with in-depth coverage and illustrations. Content is broken down into bite-size cards to help you learn on the go. 

Each main topic is broken down into three difficulty levels, with a quiz at the end of each level. You can challenge yourself by taking up the certification exam at the end of every module. 
 
Brought to you by Zerodha, India's largest stockbroker. Varsity is completely open and FREE to access.
metadata.description_html:
Zerodha Varsity is an easy to grasp, collection of stock market lessons with in-depth coverage and illustrations. Content is broken down into bite-size cards to help you learn on the go.

Each main topic is broken down into three difficulty levels, with a quiz at the end of each level. You can challenge yourself by taking up the certification exam at the end of every module.

Brought to you by Zerodha, India's largest stockbroker. Varsity is completely open and FREE to access.
metadata.summary:
Zerodha Varsity is an easy to grasp, collection of stock market lessons with in-depth coverage and illustrations. Content is broken down into bite-size cards to help you learn on the go. 

Each main

reviews.author: lyra 21
reviews.content: Looked promising, fell for the bait lmao. There's no way to get access to the app without surrendering your Google or Facebook account information. There's no option for using another email either. Rather, this is forced upon the user. For an app that says "Works Offline", surely there are ways to make logging in optional? Not everyone wants to take quizzes and get the certification. Baiting and blocking doesn't sit well with me. Uninstalled immediately.

reviews.author: Anurakt Srivastav
reviews.content: Useless app, don't even tell the reason why using this indicator what it means, and there is no search option to search a topic, you have to manually go to find something if you need to know about something specific. Very very incomplete app. Not even good for beginners. Even a book is more helpful you can directly jump in a PDF.

reviews.author: Ar Rox
reviews.content: WHAT IS WRONG WITH YOUR TESTS! They always mess up my answers and show that I selected wrong answers that I never really chose! I should have gotten 250/250 in my Stock Market Basics certification test. Somehow, after submitting, it showed that I chose 5 wrong answers when I clearly remember choosing the correct ones! This has happened for every quiz and test I have taken. Please Fix This Zerodha! I appreciate the content but this is beyond infuriating!

reviews.author: Salman A.
reviews.content: It's an excellent concept to offer Live Classes, but the execution by the team falls short. Offering live sessions is a fantastic initiative, but it's frustrating when participants can't access them due to a lack of shared links. The sessions should be easily accessible through the website or app, yet the "Join session" option remains inactive. Additionally, the lack of timely responses to emails adds to the frustration.

reviews.author: A Google user
reviews.content: I think there is a glitch in technical analysis module 2 final exam as I scored 80 out of 120 which is 67% approximately which is pretty much higher than passing 60%. Then too, it says I didn't qualify for the final exam. This can't be the case as it was my first attempt also. Kindly look into it and provide a solution for it. I will change the rating once the issue is fixed. I have already written a mail regarding the same to your email address mentioned above.

reviews.author: Anand T
reviews.content: Why does it require additional permissions from kite like account balance and margins? No option to access anonymously. Only kite, Google or Facebook. Not worth the privacy breah just for progress and quizzes. Better off using the website on a PC. (developer responded saying it gets only email and profile details. but the app clearly indicates it also needs account balance and margins while authorizing)

reviews.author: Aeshvry Rajaura
reviews.content: I was going well, and I was liking this product. But in the end of the module when I went for certification exam, the app stuck and didn't start the exam, and I mistakenly pressed the button multiple times. After some time exam started and I spent 25 minutes in the exam but when i submit my answers the application said 'Max attempts has reached. This is so annoying.

reviews.author: Anoop Verma
reviews.content: I downloaded the app yesterday and had given the 5* ratings. Today I finished all the modules and cleared the Certificate examination also. But I am unable to download my certificate. When I click the "Download PDF", the popup says Not enough permission to store file. I have given all permission to the app, but still I am getting the same error. Please look into the matter and do the needful. (If possible, send it to my Email.) I am force to rate one star today. Sorry.

reviews.author: Vinay Singh
reviews.content: The content is great, but I can't connect the web Varsity course with the app. I want it to get automatically updated in my varsity mobile app when I'm reading from web. One more thing is that in app I'm seeing related wall clips in which there are links given to different articles but in the web I'm not seeing those features. Please provide these features. Please acknowledge when you receive this review. Thanks...

reviews.author: Sandy Singh
reviews.content: This app must be in multilingual as many of unable to understand the fast english and market terms , india hold vast variety in the field of language I try to suggest the same app to many of knonny but they , uninstall by saying that this is in totally in english how we can get the term we can't have pan copy every where to note down and think later , I would rather say close the app or bring many languages ( atleast major ones) so each can learn and earn Hope u will take it serious 🤞

reviews.author: Rick paul
reviews.content: Hi Zerodha Security team, After this app getting installed for the first time, a virus has suddenly been detected during the process of initial scanning to launch the app. So I uninstalled it from my phone and again tried reinstalling it but the result is same for me. Please find from your end if there's any security attacks happening or not or any sort of bug after the patch updates. Please do let me know about it so that I can give a try once again. Indrajeet

reviews.author: KONDLE RAJASHEKAR
reviews.content: The content is great but the app is a very big problem... It doesn't save or show your progress even though you are logged in. It is asking me to complete the quizzes to be eligible for certification even though I have completed my quizzes. I have just been stuck there. It's just so stupid how the application works!

reviews.author: Awinash
reviews.content: Provide option to highlight. Material is very good. Edited: Don't force to login. Think what will happen if someone is trying to login on secondary device. I don't know why indian developers are more interested in users' personal data like indian aunties. Stop behaving like this. Keep login as optional menu.

reviews.author: A Google user
reviews.content: I took a quiz on model 1, almost all the answers which i ticked was correct answer, after submitting it the option change and i was not able to complete the certificate course because of bad error in the program. I will give u 1star became of poor performance.

reviews.author: jaishree saini
reviews.content: I had start using this app few days ago and after reading 1 module. I was thinking to give certificate exam. After opening the certificate exam, first it shows the instruction and thn directly shows that the time to take the certificate exam is over. I still can't find the reason. I have read all the instructions for taking the certification exam, but it does not show any time criteria, so I could not find the reason how it finishes within a few seconds without even opening.

reviews.author: Eshaan Malik
reviews.content: Unfair. As each exam decreases the points a person can score I made sure to study the subject well. But when I reached for the final exam for the certification my exam started with the second round that is 8.5 marks per question. So I scored 21/21 - but what I go was comparatively 40 points less.

reviews.author: Aditya Lata
reviews.content: Not sure of the zerodha login option, but all other login options - Google and Facebook seem to be broken. There is no option to continue without signing in. Effectively making the app useless if a user cannot even login. Dev team please take a look.

reviews.author: A Google user
reviews.content: The content is not updated frequently. The app has only 5 modules whereas the varsity page has 12 modules. Moreover, some content in the app is missing compared to live blog page.

reviews.author: Ayush Garg
reviews.content: While taking the quiz it shows to reselect the correct options before moving towards next question. But it counts only the 1st click doesn't matter if you first by mistake select the incorrect option and then reselect the correct options it will count the 1st incorrect option . Because of this my 2 questions got wronged

reviews.author: Debjit Das
reviews.content: Worked perfectly for a month. For the last 2 days, I'm unable to login and read as the app crashes and closes down everytime I attempt to login. Very frustrating.

reviews.author: Sayan Haldar
reviews.content: I completed my module and passed the test successfully, but I’m not able to download my certificate. I’ve tried clearing cache, updating the app, and even re-logging in, but the issue still remains. Please fix this problem or provide an alternate way to download the certificate. The learning content is excellent, but the certificate download feature really needs improvement.

reviews.author: Alok Verma
reviews.content: Please remove End Screens>Elements from the videos. It is interfering with the content of the videos. [Old comment w/o any resolution yet: I have written an email explaining how Varsity logo is interfering with the content of the video. I haven't got any response yet. AS STATED: it has been already sent. Done once more with no response yet.]

reviews.author: PRAVIN SHAH
reviews.content: Inspite of ticking the right answers for the option module certification, i didnt get the certificate. I reviewed the answers and found that although I had selected the right option, the software showed that I had selected another option and that the option previously selected by me was the right option! This happened two times , after which I gave up all hopes of arguing with your software. Now onwards,I will consider all your certifications as null and void. I had studied really hard for this

reviews.author: tarun verma
reviews.content: No Doubts, structure is great in learning very simple language, easy to understand, progress tracking but I don't know why if I click on my first module the on explore it is showing 93%. Each card 00/01, 00/02 and so on, even I have cleared the quiz. So currently rating average let it sort then I will change my rating. Anyways I continued with next module but found absolute return formula vs answer is not matching in it. Now reducing my rating till I get confirmation from varsity Team.

reviews.author: A Google user
reviews.content: The App's all tests are flawed .. I marked some answers initially but before submitting, I changed them; then also in the final results it is showing all the initially marked wrong answers. .. Moreover if I retake the test and mark some other answers, then also it is taking the previous initially marked answers ... So all the marking which I received is completely flawed... Plus on the certificate it is displaying wrong name ...

reviews.author: anu shivaprasad
reviews.content: Content is really beautifully explained. But there is lot of issues. Though I choose right answer when I submit my answer will be changed. This is not first time but it happened to me so many times. Even in final quiz I had done only 1 mistake but in results they showed 4 answers were wrong, when I checked they had changed my answer. Next time I take test I made sure if I had selected all right ones and clicked submit, guess what again same issue they had changed my ans. Please fix this bug.

reviews.author: A Google user
reviews.content: useful app but found few bugs 1. While attempting quiz for first module the response got auto submitted the moment I started quiz because of which I lost one attempt and 15% less points awarded. 2. On certificate, the date of issue is 01/09/2018 even though I attempted today. 3. Only two modules available update remaining ASAP. I'll update this review if I found anything else. PS: Sorry for being a critic and pointing only bugs :)

reviews.author: Divit Sinha
reviews.content: Unfortunately the certification test scores are not calculated properly for some modules, and when I review the results and I find that it is somehow not matching the number of correct answers, even on the first try. I have tried contacting support but there is no option for raising a ticket for this issue

reviews.author: latha Choodaiah
reviews.content: The content is incredible and it's a complete 5/5 for that. But the app scores only 2 stars due to the glitch it has. Recently I completed currencies, commodities and G secs module and in the final certification assessment though it was the my first attempt app shows it aa 03/03 attempts and gave me 150/250. I had 20 questions correct in the first attempt should have got me score 200/ 250. It is also not showing the date of completion. Please fix it

reviews.author: navya mergu
reviews.content: Looks like a whole chapter on professional trading for options is missing. The same modiles are available on website but not on app. Without this, the options trading chapters looks disconnected from the flow and difficult to understand.

reviews.author: dixit gajjar
reviews.content: This app has less content then their site Edit-You are wrong buddy if you see in technical analysis there's not mentioning of line chart, bar chart there's only mentioning of candle stick......thats why i said app has less content.......

reviews.author: A Google user
reviews.content: On selecting Font size increase and decrease button under display settings, some times not all the words in the page is visible. Some words at the end of paragraph are missing while increasing the font from small to big.

reviews.author: Pavani
reviews.content: It's good app for SM.but I found one problem that in laptop I saw more content in website than in mobile app....so problem arises whether we must read from app or website because there are 12 modules in website but 7 modules in app..... Remaining 5 modules means a lot..plus update it into the phone

reviews.author: A Google user
reviews.content: The content is good but there is issue with tests. I attempted the technical analysis test once and I couldn't score the required marks so i wanted to take it again but it didn't allow me. Please fix this issue.

reviews.author: SWASTIK PADHI
reviews.content: Integrating all newsletters (aftermarkets, dailybrief, finshots, chatter) into Varsity would make learning and staying updated much more convenient.

reviews.author: A Google user
reviews.content: Its a waste app considering that they offer u so much more when u open varsity in ur browser. All the topics r available in browser varsity, while in app just 5-6 topics r made available. Rather it shud b opposite of it. Hope u r listening zero da

reviews.author: A Google user
reviews.content: The content is very good. But the app has too many bugs. I scored 130/150 in the beginners test, but i did not get the certificate because the app says I scored less than 60%.

reviews.author: aRvInD Gr
reviews.content: App to use feels good, but it's such a waste to have, if website has more chapters. Update - Don't think screenshot is required. The issue I brought up, was website had more chapters, whereas app is selected few

reviews.author: Prateek Singh
reviews.content: Some of the card are added 2 to 3 times in the same chapter but It can be improve in further update. Otherwise it is a good app for beginner trader's

reviews.author: jagath jogj
reviews.content: Information in very good, but in fundamental analysis modules, why the financial values from ARBL balance sheet or P&L are not matching the explanation in all the places. ARBL PAT - 3674cr but in explanation value is 367.4cr

reviews.author: Hrishikesh Shukla
reviews.content: You can surely go for it as it is a freeware. But there are some issues, modules are based & sorted as per different methods but writer has chose to skip topics in the middle & pick it up in other modules, also none of the methods are explained in depth & with proper examples, this results in half baked knowledge of everything but you can't apply it. The modules on app & on downloadable pdf are not exactly the same. You can use this for the basics & then buy a proper course for real education.

reviews.author: Suchitha Raghunathan
reviews.content: The modules and cards are well researched and easy to understand. I appreciate that the information is presented in bite sized pieces. I would encourage looking into the motivational aspect of keeping people reading. I receive no acknowledgement of goals achieved, my streak days aren't tracked. The modules and cards will only reach people if they feel good about coming back to learn everyday. Look at Duolingo as an example. Let us feel like we've accomplished something.

reviews.author: Vishal Srinivas
reviews.content: This is really such an amazing app to learn, and for educating the new people to start with trading. But I cannot give more than 3 stars because the content is not proofread, there's a lot of spelling and grammatical mistakes, sometimes it's hard to make out of somethings. Please just before releasing the content. Proofread it and release it. Will really boost the content quality.

reviews.author: Fahad Fazz
reviews.content: The only bad thing about the app is when we select an answer while attempting the quiz, the app shows that we have selected a different option. We come to know about this only when we chose to see the answers. I have just now attempted module one certificate quiz and my 3 answers were shown wrong due to the bug in app, but I have cleared the exam. Just solve this. Please!

reviews.author: A Google user
reviews.content: Nice learning app with no ads. Love the concept of micro learning. Navigation across chapters doesn't seem to be working - need to go back to the ToC at the end of each chapter, to move to the next one. Content top level structure is nicely thought through, but individual concepts are sometimes confusingly written. Two modules show "Coming Soon", wonder when that is going to happen (no dates indicated).

reviews.author: A Google user
reviews.content: A conflicted review because i have learnt and am still learning so much from this app but it feels like someone gave up midway in the second module of technical analysis itself. There are typos but that's not a big deal. The other modules haven't been incorporated yet but they are working on that. But there are big errorsin the testing process.I cannot retake the test , the option doesnt come for the final certificate quiz. The quizes itself have a few wrong answers.Futures course is incomplete

reviews.author: A Google user
reviews.content: Couple of points here. Firstly, the app is well made and easy to use. That does not mean it can be improved more. Secondly, there sections where the actual meaning/abbreviations are not the correct one. Also, all abbreviated words should be provided with full form. For instance, demat is dematerialization account and is a depository. Thirdly, more documents/ info should be introduced to make the reader understand more thoroughly. Even though the topics are well segregated. Hence overall 3 star.

reviews.author: bhargavi sweety
reviews.content: Dear Varsity, Please do create an index page. It helps a person a lot. In the way he gets an idea like how many chapters are there in each module. All the clicking on each and every module, again basic, intermediate and advance. It kills time and interest. Try to create glossary page where a person can find meanings of particular important terms. Please sir🙏 App is excellent for information. A great place for learning. Please do create such kind of options sir please.

reviews.author: Akash Mandal
reviews.content: I've been using the app for a week now, and it's been a nice learning experience. However, one bug that bothers me is that the streak doesn't update. I've set a goal of 3 cards a day but the streak does not update once I complete the daily goal. It's still stuck at 0.

reviews.author: Unnati Vaish
reviews.content: The app gives the user a good overview of the stock market with examples but the point are not calculated accurately and can you also check that in module 1 Advance ( chapter 1) is not loading completely due to which I cannot move further to rest of the chapters.Make sure to correct it asap

reviews.author: Anshul Saraf
reviews.content: The design and interface of the app is beautiful, but I have 2 suggestions: 1. Introduce an option to go full dark mode. 2. Have someone read through the text in the lessons and rectify the many grammatical errors and typos. This one is the most necessary, in my opinion.

reviews.author: Shehmina Saidalavi
reviews.content: I really like the format and notes. But each time during quiz, the answers are marked incorrectly in the result.They are not showing the answers which i marked during the quiz. Instead a different answer. This is disturbing especially when my all answers are correct. This will eventually deny me the certificate.

reviews.author: Gaurav Singh
reviews.content: App reading content is nice and easy to understand. But they should make the option for the text to go a bit larger. The current max text size isn't enough for small screen phones. Also at end of each chapter there should be an option to go to next chapter. Please add this.

reviews.author: ROR BEATS
reviews.content: The app is good if u want to learn, but while taking up the quiz and certificates quiz it automatically choose the wrong options for me where I remember I choose the right ones , in most of the cases so now I can't get the certificate !

reviews.author: Pratik Bhuite
reviews.content: Varsity's content is excellent but the app is not in sync with the website. On website, I could see Module 11, Personal Finance, which isn't available on the app. Can you please tell me when all the modules will be available on the app?

reviews.author: A Google user
reviews.content: Bug Report: Currently at Module 1> Chapter 1 (Intermediate). I end the 11 cards using right button, post which i get Chapter completion pop-up. I click continue and is taken back to first card of chapter 1 (Intermediate). When i click next button on bottom i am taken to card 2 of chapter 1. Clicking next again takes me to Chapter 2 (Intermediate) Card 3 and so on. Thus i was shown the first 2 cards incorrectly. However, i do not face any issues accessing chapter 2 directly.

reviews.author: A Google user
reviews.content: Excellent but needs a few improvements. I don't know why but my goal streak is not updating at all. Even if I complete the goal, it remains 0 everyday. Please help me with this. Overall, I am amazed to see such helpful information from free!

reviews.author: Aravind Narayanan
reviews.content: This app provides detailed and quality financial education for free. However the info is replete with spelling mistakes which just goes on to show that the editing/proofreading team did an extremely shoddy job. This leads to the falling credibility of your certificates and is also an injustice to all those who worked hard to pass the exams. Don't let these small things make people cast aspersions on the actual content of the modules which is very well crafted and wonderfully put!

reviews.author: A Google user
reviews.content: Its very easy to read and very helpful in the app reather than in web, but its crashing frequently. i saw one of the reviews that to use Android 5 and above ....i am using Android 8.1 version....can u please fix that...when we will have the full content...?

reviews.author: manjiri J
reviews.content: I love the app for its content and language that makes easy to understand. But now I am unable to login it just blankly comes back to login page after entering all credentials 🤷‍♀️ please suggest something to resolve this.

reviews.author: A Google user
reviews.content: The content is the best in class. The chapters are well structured with good examples and supporting images. It helped in gaining a lot of clarity. Please bring remaining modules to the app soon! However, there is one critical bug in the tests module, some answers are automatically changed post submission. This has happened multiple times, I choose the correct option and after submission it changes to some other option and marks as wrong. It would be great if you can fix it.

reviews.author: Shaan Chauhan
reviews.content: Honestly, everything about the app is great, but only one thing bothers me, DARK Mode. It would be great if this app had a dark mode option, the already existing dark mode is just for the text, not the whole UI. Plus, it would be better if it is a darker black as it will put less strain on eye furthermore it looks professional too. Ability to download the modules and videos would also be great incase there's no access to the internet like while traveling in a flight or train.

reviews.author: Pankaj Moulekhi
reviews.content: Hi Team Varsity, I am an avid reader of this app, and am thankful to you for providing a platform to learn about stocks and markets. I have a suggestion, can you please add an text to speech option. So, that we constantly need not read everything. As sometimes it is painful for eyes. I would request you to add an audio option for every modules so that we can listen to it, whenever possible. Keep up the good work.

reviews.author: Durga Khairwar
reviews.content: I like it! Very useful info and everything packed in easy to use ui. Here is a FEATURE REQUEST for the developers, please add features to highlight things and add a sticky note, or something for the user to just document and manage the thought, learning and notes with citations.

reviews.author: Abhishek Chowrasia
reviews.content: it goes without saying how helpful this app is, but there's this one bug or an issue that I can't find my way through, upon completing a module there's this option to answer the quiz, for me it is stuck at the loading screen. I can't pass through the screen hence being unable to answer the quiz. other than that app is nice.

reviews.author: Dhruv Sinojiya
reviews.content: After updating the app, it no longer shows Hindi content. Even after logging out and reinstalling the app, my previous achievements are not showing up. Please fix this issue as soon as possible.

reviews.author: A Google user
reviews.content: An information packed app with great content. An issue I noticed was with the Quiz section after the Basic Stock Market Module. After completing the entire quiz and sending it in for submission, I didn't receive any feedback with my score. All I saw on the screen was this rotating icon in the middle as though it was loading. But after leaving it for a minute, the icon just continued spinning. I'm guessing it doesn't work.. - 1 star for that.

reviews.author: A Google user
reviews.content: Very good app for learners having keen interest in stock market. but I would like to mention that I have cleared all the beginner and intermediate level of basics of stock market course but I couldn't clear the advanced level.So is there a possibility to get another chance to attempt the advanced level nd help me in getting a certificate for basics of stock market, Kindly help. So I would request Zerodha to kindly give me another chance to attempt the advanced level and help me rewarding a cert

reviews.author: Ayush Kumar Singh
reviews.content: The content is good but there are some bugs here. Firstly the daily progress isn't tracked at all. I complete the set number of cards but still the streak doesn't increase. This is really annoying. Secondly, when continuing with a module, if we're at the last card, then the next module doesn't start automatically. We have to go through the contents and select the module.

reviews.author: vishali tuli
reviews.content: Dear Sir/Mam Greetings of the day!! It was amazing to learn about the basics of stock market through your app. The only problem i faced is when i attempted quiz there are some technical errors. I choosed the right options but in results the wrong answers were selected automatically...and it happened in module quiz as well specially 1 ques which was repeated in module quiz and certification quiz. It would be great if you will look after that as well. Otherwise it is great experience to learn!!

reviews.author: Prashant Bharda
reviews.content: The app is very helpful to learn ...but I found a bug in module 1 chapter 1 that there are total 19 cards but i can scroll up to 16 only after that i can't go further using next also. So fix that and another suggestion is that when the answers are been shown of the quiz it will be better if the wrong option is been ticked red with the right green coloured one

reviews.author: Jay Talreja
reviews.content: App has great content and all the information is simple and easy to understand. In module 11 of Personal Finance, chapters are not available to read after chapter 8. It seems that after chapter 8 all the chapters are showing and error "Unable to fetch cards". Another bug which I found, I am not sure if this can be fixed or not. For example I am at end of a card in any chapter and when I go to next card, I am somehow at the same length of the card as previous, like end of next card as well.

reviews.author: A Google user
reviews.content: The learning is personalised and fun. But there are spelling mistakes in some chapters so you guys should look into it. Plus if there could be a new app on which us learners can simulate stock market trading using virtual currency that would be a really hands on practical learning experience and would help us apply all the concepts to understand better!

reviews.author: kzfitnez made easy
reviews.content: Really liked the way tutorial are made and the simplicity with which the trainer teaches, that really makes one understand the basis. Just one advice for Zerodha to add paper trading in either Varsity or Zerodha so beginners doesn't have to hop to a third app to try their hands with risk free trading. That would be beautiful if all of that comes into one umbrella one app.

reviews.author: Aditya Baldawa
reviews.content: The only bad thing about the app is when we select an answer while attempting the quiz , the app shows that we have selected a different option. We come to know about this only when we chose to see the answers. I have just now attempted module one certificate quiz and my 3 answers were shown wrong due to the bug in app, but I have cleared the exam. Just solve this. Please!

reviews.author: A Google user
reviews.content: The Cards system is really helpful.. and the way everything is explained, it's very helpful for a noob like me.. But there are a couple of typos here and there.. How to report them? Have someone who doesn't know about this topic proof read the complete app, they will be able to point out the typos for you.. If someone with prior knowledge of trading tries to proof-read they won't be able to find all the typos as they will skim through the topics..

reviews.author: Ken Sonny
reviews.content: Facing an issue. For the certification exam. I entered my name. However they used another name on the certificate (corresponding to name on email ID). Is there any way to correct this?. Edit : My app is running on the latest update and device is Samsung galaxy S20 FE. Another suggestion. While reviewing the quiz/ exam, it would be good if the wrong options were shown.

reviews.author: Subhash Yadav
reviews.content: Varsity by Zerodha is a great app for learning about the stock market, but it's missing a dark mode option. As someone who studies in the evening, the bright white background can be a strain on my eyes. Please add a dark mode option to make the app more comfortable to use in low-light situations.

reviews.author: Stacy
reviews.content: The app is very resourceful and has concise content and is easy to understand. But ever since I've installed it in facing issues with the daily streaks not being updated and recent progress with the modules not being saved forcing me to skip cards and go forward to where I last left it. Please fix it!

reviews.author: Dishant Jogiya
reviews.content: The mobile application doesn't cover as much information as the website of Varsity. But the website includes all the points which are in the application. So save some memory of your phone and study from Website. Example : The Fibonacci retracement topic is in Module 2 i.e. technical analysis, of the web version. But I can't find the same in the mobile application.

reviews.author: Rohan
reviews.content: Such an effortless app. Simple navigations, be it any phone. The way of writing is quite engaging. Once you start reading, hard to drop off. Analogies are mostly the ones you can concur with. Video modules are all the same. Great time to be in when thinking about financial literacy! Well done! BTW, no ads, no ads, yes, no ads. Unbelievable! To the team, please stay the same or keep moving in the same direction.

reviews.author: Saransh Gupta
reviews.content: Great content for anyone who wants to starts from basic and learn in a easy manner. After struggling for over a year I found versity and now I don't need to go elsewhere. You can conver the basic to the advance. Great garifics, easy to understand language and much thaughtful arrangements of information in the modules. I would have given it a 10 star rating if possible

reviews.author: Bhabani Shankar Sahu
reviews.content: I have been using this app for more than 2 years, and I found this the best app. It's one of the best apps to learn about the stock market and finance, from the very basic to advanced level, and that too is completely free. There are no ads, and the UI is clean and minimalistic. Such initiative by Zerodha is really very helpful. Thank you, Zerodha.

reviews.author: Mathew R Varghese
reviews.content: It's a great app to learn about Stock Markets and also gain general financial knowledge. One suggestion I would like to make is to make the daily streaks more serious...I am not receiving notifications when I have enabled the daily reminder. Please look into it.

reviews.author: Dakshit 005
reviews.content: this app has fulfilled all of my needs and the most, Appreciable about this app is it's totally free to use u can start learning about finance and trading from the very basic level I would suggest you to download this app, if you want to succeed this is my advice , even now it's latest update has come which is very much user friendly and easy to use.

reviews.author: Vinod Thorat
reviews.content: Varsity App Provides Good Knowledge, App is well Designed and Full of Modules, But Have a Question. ☆ why Is There Difference in Varsity App And Web Version. Web Version modules are Upadated to Present Data Conditions, And On Application module's are on Outdated Data . ☆

reviews.author: A Google user
reviews.content: Kudos team Zerodha!! You guys just can't stop coming up with superb stuff, can you?? :) This app is such a treat for someone as novice as myself to get started with the stock market - learning I mean. While the language is amazingly simple and layman enough for the most average of readers (like me), what I loved the most is the almost childlike creativity in the infographics and examples. Keep 'em coming and keep up the good work guys!! Thumbs up.

reviews.author: Dave Julee
reviews.content: It's an amazing app, no matter how many stars I give it will never be enough, it's that good. The content is in text format so alot of people won't like it but I just love it, Just want you guys to show some more ways to calculate intrinsic value of a company, there is only one method in the fundamental analysis module. Else it's just amazing

reviews.author: Rinshad
reviews.content: Well the app is good for learning and purposes,but it has some bugs that I think needs to be fixed,the cards we have read does not count so it is difficult to find them,the streak mechanism doesn't work properly,also I think bookmark the words features to be also included, overall it's easy to use.(I've updated the app and still has several bugs,during the certificate examination,it requires a name and wrote in my name ,but after the exam the certificate is still showing my google name)

reviews.author: A Google user
reviews.content: First of all I must appreciate the Graphic designer who worked on illustrations, they are simply awesome. He illustrated all the scenarios so well that every graphic is filled with fun and information. He must be an artist and a trader. Every chapter and module is well organized. Navigation is also very intuitive. I really loved this app and I'm addicted to this app like I addicted to social media app. Web version is also awesome. Thank you for the drive you have taken to educate us. Can you please update the content with recent charts? After completing the module I was trying see some real time data, but unable get the info properly. Thanks

reviews.author: Pramathesh Gajjar
reviews.content: I started trading without understanding how the market is functioning and which things one should consider as a beginner... I installed this app after I lost sufficient amount in stocks. Going through this app I could understand why I made loss. Its an easy app to learn, not only for beginners but for intermediates as well. This app doesn't only teach trading in the market it is more than that. P.S. I am still learning :)

reviews.author: Ajit Mundhekar
reviews.content: The content is simply amazing. You can't find this level of in depth knowledge about stock market anywhere for free. Chapters are well organized which means as you read them through, you can track your progress. Earlier I used to believe that individual investors can only do fundamental analysis as technical analysis is only for experts from finance background. Varsity proved me wrong ;)

reviews.author: Yash Mishra
reviews.content: I've gotta say, didn't expect to do almost every module via Varsity They offer from basics of stock market to taxation and personal financey/ fundamental analysis as well. The information is well framed and the overall interface is very user friendly, the quiz and the certification course makes you sure if you're clear with the subjects. Great app, great content positioning, can't emphasize enough about explanation with examples. Great course, easy to understand and remember content :)

reviews.author: Swarnendu
reviews.content: Just Fabulous. There's a bug I would like to let you know. The app is running, and I lock my phone. After few minutes when I unlock my phone, the app crashes. This however doesn't happen if I quickly lock & unlock the phone. It only happens when the phone is locked for long and the app's running in background.

reviews.author: Nishant Sharma
reviews.content: Don't know about the certificates and all. Don't know about the issues people are talking. But genuinely, this is the best app to learn stock market. Their content and way of explaining is so much easy and awesome. I am still reading chapters but couldn't resist myself to write about the app, when I am in the middle of learning. Really really good app. Thank You and Love you guys ❤️

reviews.author: Mahesh Odedra
reviews.content: Hi Team, My app experience is fantastic and I am my way of completing all modules. I just want to add one point not sure if it's relevant to all users or not but I'll be more excited if I can change the app language to HINDI like web version, I request you to update the app in a way so that we can read all modules in HINDI as well. Awaiting your positive response on this. Thanks Your Happy User

reviews.author: A Google user
reviews.content: Absolutely a steal applivation for all the beginners. I was facing a lot of difficulty in understanding the stocm market. But this application has made my life easier and I'm pretty sure it would make your life easier too. It has module wise and chaoter wise breakdowns and on top of that there is a quiz at the end of every module.

reviews.author: Abhishek Narula
reviews.content: The Application is very easy to use and for a lay man the wording are also easy to understand but there are some errors in some of the questuons in the application . Just a suggestion you guys should have an additional slot in menu where one can send the screen shot of the error which will help you to make the user experience best .

reviews.author: VIVEK LADUMOR
reviews.content: Great experience with the app ! Content is best. No one would ever provide such great information for free. But you guys have done very well. Some bugs in progress module and cards read are not working as well but that doesn't metter. For me content is important and that I'm getting very well. So keep going and keep bringing such content!

reviews.author: Varun Mirasdar
reviews.content: Hi thanks for the superb app. A few things if you could implement... Correct sentence mistakes, some are not constructed properly. The number of cards read is showing zero even though I gave certificate exam. And for each quiz and certificate exam please also highlight wrong answers given by us. We cannot always remember what we have entered. Thanks.
